next_steps: Perform VZV and HSV PCR testing via vesicular swab
Obtain HIV testing and CD4 count
Order a rapid plasma reagin (RPR) and treponemal-specific test for syphilis
Perform a physical exam to evaluate for generalized lymphadenopathy and additional mucosal involvement
Consider skin biopsy with viral culture and histopathology
Initiate empiric contact and airborne isolation precautions
Assess vaccination history and prior varicella-zoster exposure
